blockingIssues.description: `range_end()` computes `(*year + 1, 1)` for December months. `Horizon::new_month` and `Horizon::parse` accept any non-zero `i32` year (e.g., `2147483647-12`), so `*year + 1` can overflow and panic in debug builds. This leaves a panic path in the range methods and means invalid construction is not fully validated at construction time.
